# `!command`

**Category:** commands

Run a command on the target directly, without a shell. Safer than `!shell` (no shell injection) but no pipes, redirection, or builtins. See [shell vs command](../../../usage/shell-vs-command/).

## Notes

- Forbidden characters: ; < > & * ? { } [ ] $ ` — and no pipes or shell builtins.
